title: We use cookies
description: Hospeda uses cookies to ensure the site works and, with your consent, to report errors and analyze how you use it. Necessary cookies are always active.

necessary.label: Necessary
necessary.description: Cookies essential for the site to function: user session, language preference, and consent state. These cannot be disabled.

crashReporting.label: Crash reporting
crashReporting.description: Sends errors that occur while you use the site to Sentry (without personally identifiable information). Lets us fix bugs that affect you. Recommended to keep enabled.

analytics.label: Usage analytics
analytics.description: Anonymous statistics about how visitors navigate the site (most-viewed pages, search flows). Does not include error monitoring.

marketing.label: Marketing
marketing.description: We currently do not use marketing or advertising cookies. This field is reserved for future use.
